title: Locktouch
description: Makes Vaults easier to loot by adding even more gambling.
body:
# Locktouch

A small mod that makes Vaults easier to loot by adding a few extra layers of gambling.

Made for a creative jam hosted by my friend [Tau](https://modrinth.com/user/Double_Pi)!

## Lockpicks

**Lockpicks** are craftable items that have a chance of opening a Vault, but break upon use. By default, the chance is 30%, but this is configurable.

**Diamond Lockpicks** can be used to open Ominous Vaults.

## Lockpicking Charm
The **Lockpicking Charm** is an item that allows you to reuse Trial Keys or Lockpicks occasionally. When held in the offhand, it grants a 40% chance for the Key/Lockpick to not get consumed upon use. (Chance is configurable for each)

Lockpicking Charms are rarely dropped by Pillagers, but may also be found by brushing Suspicious Sand blocks in Desert Temples.
